commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an Ollama Kimi-cloud visible-content sanitizer that strips inline reasoning prefixes from streamed and final assistant text, plus regression tests and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +183, Tests +473, Docs +1. Total +657 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and related proof: current main builds final Ollama text from `response.message.content` and streams `chunk.message.content` immediately, so the reported delimiter-prefixed Kimi content would be visible. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This automerge-opted replacement PR has no narrow repair finding from this review; the remaining action is CI and maintainer acceptance of the documented merge risks.

target.title: fix(ollama): strip inline kimi cloud reasoning leak
